category_sources: source_facts.description says skani computes ANI and aligned fraction for genomes and contigs; official GitHub README describes average nucleotide identity for DNA sequences.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is skani; official GitHub README title starts with skani.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README contains introduction, install instructions, usage context, and API notes.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/bluenote-1577/skani, so repo was not re-determined per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe ANI, aligned fraction, MAGs, genomes, and contigs; official GitHub topics include bioinformatics and metagenomics.
